justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of corporate bonds, which is a key metric in the fixed income and credit markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of BB in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?
